Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 10-06-21,/
/CAL:CJC PLACEMENT STATUS/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE BEGERT APPEARING THROUGH ZOOM/X: INTERPRETER NOT REQUIRED TODAY/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL: CJC TRANSPORT ORDER & PROPOSED STAY AWAY ORDER/INTC/X: COLLABORATIVECOURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND SERVED IN OPEN COURT/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT BE RELEASE FROM CUSTODY ON HIS OWN RECOGNIZANCE  FOR THE PURPOSE OF TREATMENT DIRECTLY TO A REPRESENTATIVE FROM THE LATINO COMMISSION OR ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/SAORD/X: THE DEFENDANT IS HEREBY ORDERED TO STAY AWAY FROM THE FOLLOWING LOCATIONS: STAY OUT OF AREA OF GOLDEN GATE & LARKIN STREET,  EXCEPTTO ATTEND CJC COURT PROCEEDINGS; MEET WITH CASE MANAGER; COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN, I,E,, ATTEND ESL IF ON TREATMENT PLAN, AND ATTEND GROUPS/CONTD:STATUS OF TRANSPORT/DOPU: IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CTORD:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/SHER/BAIL:1000/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/CONTD:OR MOTION/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE BEGERT APPEARING VIA ZOOM/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL: ASSESSMENT & LETTER/DAWT/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE SING APPEARING VIA ZOOM/STWPX/X: FULL TIME WAIVER NUNC PRO TUNC TO 12-23-20/VD: 01-21-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE IN M09/CONT/DOPC/

/CAL:STATUS OF DEPARTMENT 9 CASE #20013421/LD:02-05-21/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/CONTD;ASSESSMENT & LETTER/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 02-05-21 (30TH)/987,2/BAIL: 50000/SA2: GOLDEN GATE AND LARKIN/SAORD/SAORD3/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/CONTD: CJC ASSESSMENT ON12-23-20 AT 8:30 A,M, M08/DOP/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
